feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Question About Associating Attributes Across Dimensions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
I am importing an Excel file into SAP Analytics Cloud and have a question about whether my approach will work.

Here’s the situation: I have two dimensions, "Dep" and "Rec," which contain the following data:

  • Dep: DepA, DepB
  • Rec: Rec1, Rec2

I’m trying to ensure that the attributes of my "Account" dimension and the "Value" measure are associated with both "Rec" and "Dep." However, the attributes of the "Account" dimension have the same names but are associated with different values.

Does anyone know if this setup will work or how I might need to adjust it? Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: reports in S/4HANA Cloud system ?
entry.content:
Can you please advise how attached requests should be modified, so relevant reports can be extracted from S/4HANA Cloud system? 

NameDescription
SAP01 - Generic user ID'sExport report 'RSUSR002' through 'SA38' or 'SUIM' and select the required report:  'Users by Complex Selection Criteria'.

Please do not select any criteria, because a complete user list is required.
SAP02 - Most recent account usageStart transaction code 'SE16' > 'USR02'
SAP03 - Accounts with initial passwordsPlease use report  'RSUSR200' through 'SA38'. At 'Selection by status of the Password' only box the 'Users with initial password'.
- Select 'Users Valid today'
- Select 'Users not Locked'
SAP04 - Parameters (password policy among other items)Generate report  'RSPARAM' through transaction 'SA38'
SAP05 - Standard account usage(SAP*, DDIC, Earlywatch and SAPCPIC).

- Transaction'SA38' > 'RSUSR003'
- Please assure that all accounts are visible on the screenshot(s)
SAP06 - Access grants of 'SAP_ALL' profile- Transaction 'SUIM'
- 'Users by Complex Selection Criteria'
- 'Profile Name' > 'SAP_ALL'
- Select 'locked' and 'unlocked users'
- Please do not use any other filters

SAP07 - Log of grant/revoke of SAP_ALL-profile- Transacton 'SUIM'
- 'Change Documents For Users'
- Select 'From Date' and 'To Date' date range (01.01.202X until today)
- 'Added Profiles' > 'SAP_ALL'
- 'Deleted Profiles' > 'SAP_ALL'
- Deselecte all other options
SAP08 - Active accounts with standard SAP_NEW-profile- Transaction 'SUIM'
- 'Users by Complex Selection Criteria'
- 'Profile Name' > 'SAP_NEW'
SAP09 - Current client settings- Show table 'T000 (SE16 > T000) or transactie 'SCC4'
- A list of SAP clients appears; click on 'production client'
- Please share the output.
SAP10 - Log of changes in table 'T000'- Choose transaction 'SCU3'; click on  'Evaluate Logs'.
- Insert  table 'T000' and the date range 01.01.202x until today
SAP11 - Users with developer key in production environment- Download table 'DEVACCESS' through transaction 'SE16'.
SAP12 - Processed transportsImport history production environment from 01.01.20xx untill today, including screenshot of parameters chosen.
SAP13 - SAP Transport Management Systemen (STMS) - TransportwegenDisplay Transport Routes
SAP14 - Change management procedurePlease provide a narrative/flow chart of the change management procedure regarding SAP
SAP15 - AP ECC - Create accounting documents by SAP_ALL / SAP_NEW usersInput for field  'USNAM' (User Name) in table 'BKPF' the unique accounts (accounts with 'SAP_ALL' and SAP_NEW") (See SAP06, SAP07 and SAP08)
SAP16- SAP ECC - Vendor changesPlease provide the following 2 exports:
a. Start transaction ‘SA38’ > ‘RFKABL00’
b. Report  ‘S_ALR_87012089’
Periode 01.01.202x untill today

entry.title: How can I add multiple role-playing dimensions in an SAC model using the same Public Dimension?
entry.content:
Does SAC have a concept of role-playing dimensions? I'd like to maintain one public dimension but import into the model multiple times. The data in the dimension will be maintained within SAC itself and I want to avoid maintaining that data in multiple dimensions. 

What I'm looking for is either a way to import the same public dimension twice into the model with different names or a way to copy the data from one dimension to the other so they are kept in sync.

entry.title: SAC LIVE BW enable Option Default Values "Keep last saved values for dynamic variables" in view mode
entry.content:
Dear all,

when editing a story the option "Keep last saved values for dynamic variables" under Setting is shown for the story as well as for specific charts/tables. 

In view mode the option is not available (although it was there in the past). My question is, how can I enable this in view mode?

Thanks

entry.title: Add multiple "Responsible Person" type properties in the same dimension
entry.content: We have a dimension where we maintain "Accounts/Customers". There are multiple roles that we maintain at the Account level e.g. Client Executive, Delivery Executive, Account Onshore Partner, Account Offshore Partner etc. We would like to maintain these as properties with a "People picker" option available similar to how it is for the Responsible Person column. Is that possible?

entry.title: Re: Synch local dimension members between models
entry.content:
Hi, I could now find the following solution to synchronize local dimensions between planning models.

  1. Create a API Subscription in the source model
  2. Create an OAuth Client
  3. Create an OData Connection and connect to OAuth Client (connection to itself)
  4. Create data model import from OData Connection and import master data of the local dimension

This technique works perfect and offers additional opportunities to replicate (master) data even between different SAC systems.

Will write a blog when I´ve some time and link it here.

Regards,

Thomas

entry.title: Can dimensions be rearranged in a SAC model?
entry.content:
I added a bunch of dimensions to my model at different times as I was working through the solution/design. 

The dimensions are now not in a proper logic order so I would like to rearrange the placement of the dimensions in the model. I don't really see an option though other than dropping and adding them all again in the order I want. Is it possible to rearrange them in some way?

entry.title: SAC Planning - Actuals Vs Plan - Variance column formula
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a standard requirement, where for a 'Month', there can be 'Actuals' and a Plan version like 'Priv1. The third column needs to show the variance between the plan and actuals.

I created a calculated column, as in the below screenshot. It works great for Priv1 !!

But the user may select another version like 'Priv2'. If that is done, the formula doesn't work. Any way to achieve this requirement?

entry.title: Help with reporting layout in SAP Datasphere/ Analytics Cloud/ Web Intelligence
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using an existing model from SAP datasphere and consuming it in SAP Analytics cloud. In Datasphere I have created several Restricted measures. 

The Raw data which I am working on is as follows:

Below is the list of all Dimensions and Measures used in the model.

Below is the list of all Restricted Measures used in the model.

In the above attachment, the measures indicated with a Red Dot represent Restricted Measures in SAP Datasphere. 

The Expressions used in each of the above Restricted Measures are as follows:

  • 2023 Full: Year = '2023'
  • 2023 Nov: Year = '2023' AND Month = '11'
  • 2024 Full: Year = '2024'
  • 2024-Nov: Year = '2024' AND Month = '11'

Likewise, in SAP Analytics cloud I have also created several dimension groups to be used along with the Restricted measures which were created in SAP datasphere.

The formula used in each of the above Calculated Dimensions include the following:

  • Cost: IF([d/"DS_Structure_Test":GL].[p/GL] = ("GL3")and[d/"DS_Structure_Test":"Doc type"].[p/Doc type]=("D5"),"Cost" ,"Others")
  • Expense: IF([d/"DS_Structure_Test":GL].[p/GL] = ("GL2")and[d/"DS_Structure_Test":"Doc type"].[p/Doc type]=("D2","D4"),"Expense" ,"Others")
  • Income1: IF([d/"DS_Structure_Test":GL].[p/GL] = ("GL1")and[d/"DS_Structure_Test":"Doc type"].[p/Doc type]=("D1","D2"),"Income" ,"Others")

In a nutshell, I was trying to group several dimensions together based on a certain condition. If the condition is true, it displays the name of the calculated dimension, else it displays "Others". 

Below is the output of the Calculated Dimensions in SAP Analytics Cloud:

The goal is to exclude the rows with "Others" in the table.

I tried using filters to the above table to exclude "Others" and below is the result:

 

Below is the expected output:

 

In SAP BW, the above output is achieved using Structures (Rows-Restricted Characteristics and columns-Restricted Key Figures) in a BeX query, but now the goal is to get the output in the same format (Rows down and Columns across) as mentioned above in SAP Datasphere/ Analytics Cloud / Web Intelligence.

 

Would be great if someone has encountered the above scenario and has achieved a solution.

Thanks in advance.

Regards, 

Saifullah Sharieef

entry.title: move & move back of table changes order of objects => how to rearrange?
entry.content:
Hi,
in a tabstrip there is 1 table (always visible) and 1 listbox which is invisible at start and can be made visible by clicking a button. As the listbox should always be above the table its background colour is white and on the top of the Tab_2 in the overview:


if a user wants to edit the table with the help of builder panel the table is moved to another tab. After editing is finished the table is moved back to its original postion and this is where my problem emerges:
when the listbox is made visible now it is barely readable because the table is on top.
I have not found an API to directly alter order of objets on a page like in the builder:
any suggestions/workarounds to push the listbox to the top again?
my current workaround: when the table is moved back I simply move and re-move the listbox too. By far not optimal but its working for now.
thank you & br
edgar

entry.title: Parameters in data action
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m working on a project where I want to trigger a data action with the following parameters: source version, target version, source month, and target month. The objective is to allow users to copy data from one version to another and choose the desired source and target month.

However, when I try to execute the data action in the story, only three parameters appear: source version, target version, and source month. The target month parameter is missing.

I’m attaching three screenshots: one showing the parameters, another showing the data action configuration, and a third showing the story interface with only three parameters visible.

How can I ensure all four parameters, including the target month, are displayed?

 

Thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: when consuming cds view its taking more than 30 sec
entry.content:
hi @Sandra_Rossi , @Andre_Fischer , @LinaRaut ,@@N1kh1l 

I created a story in SAC with the CDS view. I have only 6 measures. but it taking more than 30 secs to load. The CDS view has three table functions ( to get cumulative sum, to get the next working day and utilizing SQL script lag function) on top of an ADMP class and other sum calculations. In RSRT, the query all 6 measure are summed in a total of 12-13 secs, same with  se16n 

Regards,
Thayu.

entry.title: How to Calculate Differences Between Measures from Two Excels in SAC Story Table?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have two Excel sheets as data sources:

One contains data for the year 2024.
The other contains data for the year 2023.

Both Files include more than 20 measures and multiple dimensions, as shown in the attached Excel file. The measures' names are identical between the two years.(Merging the source files into a single file with the years as a KEY is not an option)

Based on these two files, I want to create an SAC Story table where I can calculate the difference for each measure (e.g., Measure_2024 - Measure_2023) and display the results in the SAC Story tables. 

Since linking or blending 2 models isn't supported for the table widget, I'm unsure how to achieve this.

Can anyone guide me on how to implement this in SAC?

entry.title: SAC Planning - Unable to add Value to a Parent Node
entry.content:
In my planning table example, 

  • NRR-SRV (Parent Node) : The value field highlighted in red in the below screenshot cannot be edited.
  • All the leaf nodes below NRR-SRV : The vale field highlighed in green can be edited. Once any value is given, the value gets aggregated and shows on the parent node NRR-SRV(Fig B attached below)
  • Once there is any value in NRR-SRV, I can now edit the cell. But disaggregation happens only to the leaf account cell, where we inserted the value, in this case ScvRev Usage-Terrest.
  • There is no DataLocking or Validation rules applied in the table.
  • What can be the reason why I cannot give a value directly to the parent node and do a distribute values to all the children below it? Any settings in the model or in the Account dimension to be adjusted?
  • The issue is happening only for this parent node. All other parent nodes are good, and I am able to edit it directly.

Any inputs would be great.

Thank you,

entry.title: Story/report to show all members of a Public Dimension
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a report in SAC that will just show all the members and corresponding properties from a Public Dimension?

Basically, a report which users can use to view/review master data.

entry.title: Automatic Forecast on Tables
entry.content: I have a table with data up to June, and I would like to create a predictive forecast for the table. However, it does not allow me to add months up to December, and no data is being generated only in one cell. Can anyone help me?

entry.title: SAC Excel Add-In BEx Query as Data Source Not Found Error
entry.content:
Hi All, I am doing a PoC to convert BEx Analyser workbooks to SAC Excel Add-in workbooks. As part of that PoC, I am using tunnel live SAC connections in SAC excel add-in to directly connect to BEx queries. I managed to add a table successfully based on the BEx queries in my excel however after sometime, when I tried changing the variables, I started to get this error below.  BEx query name hidden for security purposes

I can still add a new table in a new tab based on the queries for which I get the error above. However as soon as I log out or close the excel, on reopening I get above errors. The Prompts field is also greyed out.

refresh only allows me to clear data

I have been told that nothing has been changed with my access and hence this issue is quite bizarre. Please let me know if anyone has faced this and how you resolved it.

Thanks

Regards

Tanisha

entry.title: Dimension Description Text Options
entry.content:
Hi All,

I import Dimension properties from BW for Dimension ID and Description. Example company code and hierarchies:

Dimension ID      Description           H1

1000                   Company1001      North America

North America    North America

In the Stories, I would like to have an alternate description like NA. Is there a solution how to achieved this?

The example above is just one company code, I have hundreds and different hierarchies values. Change it manually is not an option.

Thanks in advance for your idea.

entry.title: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - Copy Actual's value to Forecast
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I am trying to copy a value from the Actual version of a month provided from a user parameter to the rest of the months in Forecast version. In my model I have GL account dimension table having different hierarchies.

I am successfully able to copy using the Advanced formula but when I add another dimension table in the model i-e Profit center or Cost Center or both, having hierarchies too. The Data Action stops working. It doesn't give any error but also doesn't give any output.

Below is the code that i am using, and I would really really appreciate if you can help me find a solution to it.

Thank you.

 

CONFIG.HIERARCHY = [d/GlAcc_MD].[h/HIR_OTHER]
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %MonthIP%
MEMBERSET [d/GlAcc_MD] = BASEMEMBER([d/GlAcc_MD].[h/HIR_OTHER], "034")
 
INTEGER @i
INTEGER @Month
INTEGER @Iterate
 
//Assigning Values to Variables
@Month = MONTH(%MonthIP%) 
@Iterate = 12 - @Month
 
FOR @i = 1 TO @Iterate
DATA([d/Date] = NEXT(@i, "MONTH", %MonthIP%))= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual") 
ENDFOR

entry.title: Query Info and BEx Variable selection in SAC Excel Add-In workbook
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using SAC excel add-in and trying to connect to SAP BEx queries directly using tunnel live connection in SAC. If I look at the SAP functions available, I don't see anything to display following information in the workbook

Also, how does one display prompt (BEx query variable selection) values in SAC to display what user has selected to refresh the tables in the workbook.

Thanks

Regards

Tanisha
